mechanics.excerpt: Freeborn characters are conceived and born in the natural way; and few become warriors_ In tact, some Clans prohibit freebirths from attaining warrior status Clan characters must then choose caste which influ- ences all other facets of character creation: warrior, scientist, technician_ merchant; laborer 0r dark (bandit) Trueborn charac ters must choose the warrior caste_ Primary Language: English Secondary Languages: None Attrlbute Minlmums: Warrior: SOC 6; scientist: SOC 5; technician: SOC merchant: SOC 3; laborer: SOC 2: dark: SOC Clan characters ignore Social Standing minimum modifiers in the Life Path unless the path is specifically Clan Path; in those cases the new minimum applies even if ower than the pre- vious minimum These minimums also serve as maximums: at the end of the Life Path_ Clan character' $ Social Standing Attribute must be equal to his Social Standing minimum; 32
